name: PipeStone Grill
about: PipeStone Grill is a golf-focused venue centered around an 18-hole, par 72 championship course designed by Arthur Hills. The facility is owned by the City of Miamisburg and operated by Hampton Golf Management. It offers a comprehensive golf experience with a clubhouse that includes a restaurant and bar (The PipeStone Grill), indoor and outdoor event spaces, a golf shop, and both outdoor and indoor golf facilities, including Trackman simulators. The venue caters to golfers of all skill levels, featuring rolling terrain and spectacular views. It also supports various events, from casual gatherings to weddings and corporate outings.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to premium Trackman technology for indoor practice and simulation
Stunning course views from the 18th hole at the PipeStone Grill
Variety of dining options from casual meals to full-service events
Comprehensive practice facilities and golf instruction available
Hosts a range of events including leagues and corporate outings

food_and_drink.notes: The PipeStone Grill serves a full menu with appetizers, entrees, desserts, and special event menus. Casual dining available before or after golf rounds.
No mention of alcohol service available on-site.

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor and simulator system used for indoor practice and play.

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether club rentals are available. It is recommended to bring your own clubs for the best experience, especially for using the Trackman simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The venue features The PipeStone Grill which serves food and drinks. There is no mention of a BYOB policy, so it is likely that outside food and drinks are not permitted.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: The provided content does not specify the duration for playing 18 holes on the simulator. Typically, simulator play can range from 1.5 to 2.5 hours depending on the group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue is kid-friendly. It offers junior golf lessons and is described as a great place for families and events of any variety.
